title: tournefortia heyneana
intro: Tournefortia heyneana, also known as the Indian tournefortia, is a plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tournefortia heyneana include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
